transcript.text:
(It became so cold outside these days...) It's much colder tomorrow
(Nothing can hurt me in bed...-HungryTzuyangReporter) The Cold Wave Alert would be expanded due to this
(Go away cold!)
(The ramyun that would warm me, who is chilled to the bone, and)
(glossy and juicy chicken skewers-!)
(Just a little amount for today...) It is Soso (small) Ramyun here so...
(I'll just eat a little bit to warm myself up...) I'll quickly start with chicken skewers
(After having chicken skewers to warm up the stomach)
(She's ready to dig into the ramyun...)
(What's up with the color...?!) Look at the color
(A secret weapon that makes)
(midwinter into midsummer!)
(When it's cold, 000 Ramen is the best...!) It got really hot! Just as soon as I had one bite
Hello, everyone
I'm here today at Namyeong-dong
It's very cold today

(The one that would warm up my cold body...) But I had in mind a little bit of hot soup and chicken skewers!
So I came to a place where they sell ramyun and chicken skewers together
Already excited thinking of eating something warm!
Let's go!
('Soso Ramyun Chicken Skewers' in Yongsan-gu, Seoul)
(Scanning the menu right away) There are so many dishes! Tear gas ramyun? It's probably very spicy
(Scanning quite eagerly) The type of chicken skewers!
(Chicken skewers (1p) 3,000 won) There are mild, medium, spicy, and grilled with salt
(The heart (3p) 5,000 won, chicken gizzard (2p) 5,000 won) There's also the heart and chicken gizzards!
Today, as it's called Soso (small) Ramyun here...
I'll keep it simple! Three ramyuns!
And 30 chicken skewers?!
(Okay, that's small...) Hello!
Tear gas ramyun, egg and rice cake ramyun, cheese ramyun, please
(Mild, medium, spicy flavors and grilled with salt) And five of each chicken skewer, so 20 skewers!
And can I have 5 chicken hearts and 5 chicken gizzards?

(Wait...Wait a minute...)
Tear gas ramyun is very spicy
And you can pick from level 30~100
How spicy is level 100...?
When comparing it with 70, it's not too much different for you to eat but
the soup is a little bit spicier
(She's not good with spicy food, but she gives a bold try...) Then I'll give level 100 a try...
(Finished ordering a small(?) amount!) I'll go prepare it for you
(This is the small amount I'll be eating today)
(Making it tasty with a smokey flavor)
(Glossy and fat chicken skewers!)
(Can't leave out the heart when talking about chicken skewers)
(Of course we should have chicken gizzards, famous for its texture!)
(Also the secret powder!)
(Thirty pieces! Three types of chicken skewers completed)
(The ramyun trio is about to come)

(Pull up the spicy scale!)
(The tear gas ramyun's color is looking so different...)
(The egg and rice cake ramyun that would relive the spiciness)
(The chicken skewers are coming out)
Thank you!
Is it in the order of salt-grilled heart + mild flavor chicken gizzards + medium + spicy?
- Should I put it here? - Yes!
(The ramyun trio...!) Cheese, egg and rice cake, and is this tear gas ramyun? Thank you!
The color is different! Thank you
(Ta-da, everything came out!) Looks so delicious! The ramyun smells so spicy
(First, starting with chicken skewers!) I'll first start with these chicken skewers
(Basic of basics) Let's try this salt-grilled one first!
Look at it! It looks so delicious!
It's good...!
This seasoning itself is so good
(Is this not the salt-grilled one...?) Is this the salt-grilled one? Huh?

This is the one!
This is seasoned mild flavor!
(The one I just ate was mild flavor!) Let's start with the salt!
It tastes good
The lean meat is very soft and
(10 points out of 10) the grilling level is perfect
It's a little bit chewy on the outside while it's juicy inside
(Next is the heart!) Just one heart
These aren't small, dried out hearts
It's a very big heart that is very moist and soft and chewy
This is how a heart should be!
I was confused with the order a while ago
It was twenty chicken skewers and
nine chicken hearts,
and six chicken gizzards, so
it's thirty-five in total!

(It's such a small amount...) Should I try the tear gas ramyun first?
(Incredible one...) The spiciest one! But the color is so...
The color is crazy...!
Wow
(Troublesome for our non-spicy eater...) Look at the color! It's so spicy!
(Shock and horror)
(Where did the vigor go...) Wait this is... I'm a little bit scared
It's too reddish, look at the noodles, it's red
(Goodness) I'll give the level 100 a try...
My nose is...!
This is insane with red pepper powder spice!
It doesn't have much soup. it's as little as the Bibimmyeon noodles
(The spiciness seeped well into the noodles...) The spiciness seeped in so well into the noodles
(Is it me or is the world dizzy...) Wait, I think I suddenly feel lightheaded
(Precious pickled radish) Thank you, pickled radish
I was very cold a while ago

(Burning) It became really hot! Just as I had a bite
Wow, but even though it's spicy, it's a good kind of spiciness!
There's also rice cake! Some bean sprouts too
(Enjoying the pain...) I love this kind of spiciness
(Got rid of the stress!) It's really a spiciness that gets rid of the stress!
(Complimenting myself LOL) I already ate it all! Proud of myself
(Exploding with coolness...) I'm so cool!
I'm at my max! No more!
(Having pickled radish for emergency...) It's incredible!
Until the spiciness goes away,
I'll have chicken gizzards for now!
Can you hear the sound? Crunchy Crunch crunch crunch crunch!
(The sauce completed everything...!) The sauce is really good, it's so good!
(Almost crying...)
(It's required!) You really need to eat the heart skewers! It's so good
(Willingness to revisit 1,352,093,824%...!) I think I want to visit again

The chicken skewers are my style
It's not a special taste but
it's just so good
(Hehe, so happy...)
My body became warm when it was so cold before
The medium flavor! I'll try it now
The chicken is also good but the sauce tastes really good
It's too spicy now
(Lost her tastebuds) I can't differentiate the mild and normal flavors
(Did she order something more...?) Thank you!
(The savior arrived...!) I asked for the mayo and he gave me some
Tastes great
(Alleviated the spiciness with the mayo!)
Before I try the cheese ramyun,
I'll eat one spicy skewer
It smells much better than this

(Are you okay...?)
(The tear gas ramyun was so fierce...) Am I not sensing anything after eating this?
It's not too spicy, it just has a kick!
(Wiping out the tears and runny nose)
(Spiciness staring again...!) It is spicy indeed! My tongue... It became suddenly spicy
Cheese ramyun when it's spicy! Gently!
(Making the pain stronger...) My tongue hurts and when adding the heat, it's more painful
(But still) It's good!
The best is cheese ramyun!
I like cheese ramyun the most
As expected, the cheese ramyun tastes the most delicious...!
It cooled down a little bit so...
(Chicken skewers in ramyun...?) Should I dip it in here?
(Boldly dipping it) Would it be bad?
It's good
(Already ate that much...)

The heart skewers are the best...!
(Spent a while with the chicken skewers...)
I can tell they made this with good chicken
(The one that people eat standing in front of a food truck) And it has some vibes of a street food
(Oh, didn't finish eating yet...!)
(Please move to the side...)
(That's much better...)
(Next is egg and rice cake ramyun!)
The cheese ramyun tastes the best among the ramyun and
for the chicken skewers,
the heart skewers taste the best
And next is the mild flavor!
Leftover chicken skewers
Should I put it in the ramyun?
(What a food genius..!)
Huh?

It's not Jin Ramyun
You don't know what it is?
(Excuse mode) Because it has egg and cheese, so I don't know!
(I'm a mukbang YouTuber, I'm a pro...!)
Guess what it is?
Is it Shin Ramyun...?
(Correct...!)
Very good!
(Boldly grabbing the spicy flavor...)
The spiciness comes at the last moment
(It came again)
(Please save the non-spicy eater...) Won't you eat one, producer?
- I'll eat the spicy flavor for you - Really?
(If you get to know him...He is a sweet guy....)
(Cleared the egg and rice cake ramyun!)
I go around looking for good restaurants,

and there are so many must-eat places in Namyeong-dong these days
I filmed at the 'Namyeong Chicken' last time and
It was also a must-visit place at that time
(My mayo, no!) I forgot the mayo!
(What's up with the way of speaking?) It's less spicy when dipping in it!
A bunch
(The spiciness going away...) I feel like my tongue is getting cleansed
(Only us left)
It's spicy
It's so good when dipping in the mayo
(Cleared the chicken skewers!)
The heart!
(35 chicken skewers & 3 ramyuns all cleared!)
It was very cold today, as the temperature was negative 10 degrees
(I overcame the cold with delicious food very well!) But I was able to alleviate the chill after eating this
I had a great meal once again!
